$statusLegend.ported: byte-equivalent to upstream (CI fails on drift)
$statusLegend.adapted: TypeScript port and/or namespace swap; logically equivalent
$statusLegend.extended: fork adds behavior on top of upstream
$statusLegend.added: file unique to the fork (no upstream)

files.notes: name + textdomain swapped to artisanpack namespace; attributes/supports verbatim.

TypeScript port. Adds explicit 'wp-block-group' class. Upstream's `HTMLElementControl` is reached through `blockEditorPrivateApis` via `unlock`; the fork swaps it for a plain `<SelectControl>` so we don't depend on private APIs. The `<View>` primitive is replaced with a plain `<div>`.
TypeScript port; adds explicit 'wp-block-group' class to useBlockProps.save() for renderer parity.
TypeScript port. Variation icons inlined as plain <svg>; only group / group-row / group-stack icons are retained (no `group-grid` since the grid variation is excluded — see variations.ts).

Full upstream chain (5 entries) ported. Type annotations added; logic byte-equivalent. The 4th entry's color: textClass ? undefined : customTextColor branch is preserved as `customTextColor` since textClass is always undefined for that entry's class list (matching the historical 'text color class not applied' bug semantics).
Upstream multi-block __experimentalConvert preserved (now targets artisanpack/group). Added bidirectional core/group ↔ artisanpack/group block transforms for V2 rollout coexistence.

Ports group / row / stack variations (renamed from upstream 'group-row' / 'group-stack' to bare 'row' / 'stack' since they now live under the artisanpack namespace). Upstream `grid` variation EXCLUDED — grid will ship as a separate artisanpack/grid + artisanpack/grid-item block pair (docs/plans/13-block-fork.md §2.2.1). Icons dropped (variations no longer reference @wordpress/icons).
Combined SCSS-to-CSS port. data-type selectors rewritten from core/group to artisanpack/group. base-styles variables inlined to default px values.
Inline SVG for the inserter (editor doesn't bundle dashicons).
Adapted to the visual-editor auto-discovery contract. Also exports `variations`. Upstream's PHP-side init wiring and `example` settings are not carried.

knownDivergences: edit.tsx: Replaces upstream's private `HTMLElementControl` (loaded via blockEditorPrivateApis + unlock) with a plain SelectControl. Functionally equivalent UX; avoids private-API coupling.
edit.tsx + save.tsx add 'wp-block-group' to useBlockProps explicitly; upstream relies on the auto-injected block class.
transforms.ts adds bidirectional block transforms that don't exist upstream — required to coexist with core/group during the V2 rollout.

variations.ts EXCLUDES the upstream `grid` variation. Grid will ship as a standalone artisanpack/grid + artisanpack/grid-item block pair per docs/plans/13-block-fork.md §2.2.1. Row + stack are kept as variations of artisanpack/group (NOT as separate blocks) — they share group's save/edit upstream, and the renderer-blade row/stack templates simply @include core/row and core/stack.

variations.ts: Variation names changed from 'group-row' / 'group-stack' to bare 'row' / 'stack' since they're now namespaced under artisanpack/group. Variation icons (@wordpress/icons imports) are dropped to keep the bundle lean.
placeholder.tsx: Dropped `group-grid` icon entry since the grid variation is excluded.
index.ts replaces upstream's PHP-side init wiring with the visual-editor auto-discovery contract; the `example` settings object isn't carried.
